name: Labrynth Party
desc:
You can only activate this card if you have 2 or more Normal Traps in your GY, including a "Labrynth" Trap.
Tribute 1 Level 8 Fiend monster; Set Normal Traps from your Deck, up to the number of "Labrynth" cards in your GY, with different names from the Traps in your GY.
During Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 "Labrynth" Trap from your GY. It can be activated this turn, but banish it when it leaves the field.
You can only use 1 "Labrynth Party" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
